svg.text: Spring Boot 3.3.4 - MongoDB - Layered Architecture - RESTful Design
auth paths open, others currently permitted
Ticket data also carries comments, worklog, rating token and feedback fields
HS256 token generation with 24 hour expiry
backend calls Google userinfo endpoint via RestClient
USER - ADMIN - TECHNICIAN stored on User documents
backend filter chain currently permits all non-auth routes
frontend route guards provide most visible access restriction
important architectural note: security hardening is still pending on server-side route authorization
represented through success wrapper on create
not strongly enforced yet in current config
responses are wrapped by ApiResponse.success(message, data)
target user, title, message, link, readBy
tickets embed comments and worklog entries rather than using a separate comment collection
